_note: Pre-decided signals for deterministic-mode workers. Workers read their bead-id from this file and close with the specified reason+comment. No LLM involved in workers for this eval.

impl-not-found.comment:
SPAWN: Add abstract method to BaseError
DESC: Subclasses need a `code` property declared on the ABC; lift to abstract property so the contract is explicit at the base class level.

impl-rate-limit.comment: BLOCKER: AMBIGUOUS-SPEC — Spec says rate-limit but doesn't define retry-after semantics; cannot implement RateLimitError.retry_after without a decision.

impl-validation.comment: OUT-OF-SCOPE: ValidationError requires schema-validation logic outside implementer competence; suggest re-route to evaluator
